# BillSummaries

CRS-authored summaries of a bill, from the Congress.gov /summaries endpoint. One row per bill/summary version (a bill gains a new version as it advances, e.g. Introduced, Reported); the set is replaced wholesale when the bill updates.

**GraphQL type:** `BillSummaries` · **Connection:** `BillSummariessConnection`

## Queries

| Query | Returns | Description |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `allBillSummariess(filter, orderBy, first, last, before, after)` | `BillSummariessConnection` | Paginated list with filtering and ordering |
| `billSummariesById(id: BigInt!)` | `BillSummaries` | Look up by primary key |

## Fields

| Field | GraphQL Type | Notes |
|-------|-------------|-------|
| `id` | `BigInt` |  <span style={{background:'#1877f2',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>PK</span> |
| `billId` | `String` |  <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span> <span style={{background:'#198754',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>FK</span> |
| `versionCode` | `String` | Congress.gov summary version code, e.g. ''00'' (Introduced). <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span> |
| `actionDesc` | `String` | Bill action the summary version corresponds to, e.g. ''Introduced in House''. |
| `actionDate` | `Date` | Date of the action the summary version corresponds to. |
| `summaryText` | `String` | Summary body as HTML, as published by CRS. |
| `sourceUpdatedAt` | `Datetime` | When Congress.gov last updated this summary version. |
